summary: Iteration 10 - UI/UX Overhaul Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI/UX overhaul features verified including mobile responsiveness, color palette change, WhatsApp icons, risk badges, logout button, and email notification on plan assignment.

backend: GET /api/market/live returns crypto, forex, indian data
POST /api/admin/plans/assign returns email_sent field in response
frontend: Landing page: mobile responsive (390px width) - all sections visible
Landing page: shows 'Titan Trade' branding (3 instances)
Landing page: stats bar visible (83+ Live Assets, 10 AI Strategies, 3 Markets, 5s Data Refresh)
Landing page: markets section visible
Landing page: no neon colors (#00FF94, #FF2E2E, #FFD700) found
Auth page: shows 'Titan Trade - Trading Intelligence Platform'
Auth page: clean login/signup form with tabs
Auth page: Google button visible
Signals page: market/asset/strategy selectors visible
Signals page: timeframe toggles visible (1m, 5m, 15m, 1H, 4H, 1D, 1W)
Signals page: generate button visible
Signals page: signal cards with BUY/SELL badges
Signals page: risk badges (Med Risk shown in amber color)
Signals page: bigger font for entry/SL/TP values (value-lg class)
Pricing page: 3 plans (Basic, Pro, Titan) visible
Pricing page: weekly/monthly toggle visible
Pricing page: WhatsApp icons on all 3 CTA buttons
Pricing page: contact section with WhatsApp 1 and WhatsApp 2 buttons
Settings page: has logout card at bottom
Settings page: logout button (data-testid='logout-btn') visible in logout card
Dashboard: value-lg class used (4 elements found)
Dashboard: softer emerald (#10B981) and red (#EF4444) colors
Dashboard: live indicator visible
Sidebar: shows 'Titan Trade' and 'PRO' badge
Sidebar: shows 'Titan AI' (not 'Beast AI')
Sidebar: no 'Admin' link visible
Sidebar: no 'Emergent' text visible
Journal page: mobile responsive
Journal page: trade form works with all fields

mobile_responsiveness.landing_page: PASS - All sections visible at 390px width
mobile_responsiveness.journal_page: PASS - Stats cards and form responsive

font_sizes.value_lg_class: Used for bigger numbers (4 elements on dashboard)

whatsapp_icons.pricing_cta_buttons: 3 WhatsApp icons on Get Started, Go Pro, Go Titan buttons

logout_button.settings_page: Logout card at bottom with 'Log Out' button

seed_data_creation: Signal generated for Bitcoin (BTC) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified the complete UI/UX overhaul: 1) Mobile responsiveness works on landing, auth, and journal pages at 390px width. 2) Color palette changed from neon (#00FF94, #FF2E2E, #FFD700) to minimal SaaS (emerald #10B981, red #EF4444, amber #F59E0B). 3) Font sizes increased with value-lg class for data values. 4) WhatsApp icons added to pricing page CTA buttons and contact section. 5) Risk badges (Low/Med/High Risk) show on signal cards based on risk:reward ratio. 6) Logout button added to Settings page in a dedicated Session card. 7) Email notification on plan assignment returns email_sent field in response. All existing features from previous iterations continue to work.
